overall.description: First-person video game footage (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a steady walk along a desert roadside toward the futuristic Night City skyline. The scene transitions from arid rocky Badlands terrain with sparse Joshua trees and scrub vegetation to the urban outskirts featuring towering glass buildings and neon billboards under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway roadside with rocky formations

events.description: camera passes the tall street light pole which temporarily dominates the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the desert roadside shoulder toward the distant futuristic city skyline

entered.detail: large red-brown rocky outcrop with sparse vegetation covering the left side
tall spire-like structure atop the rocky hill with industrial platforms
modern curved street light fixture on the right side of the path
metal guardrail running along the edge of the multi-lane asphalt road
cluster of tall glass and steel skyscrapers with billboards in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert highway scene with a rocky hill formation on the left and a multi-lane road on the right. The camera walks forward past a prominent street light pole, with the futuristic city skyline visible in the far distance under clear blue skies.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the roadside path past desert vegetation with the city growing larger in view

entered.detail: distinctive desert tree with spiky branches growing from the rocky hillside
small boulders and stones scattered along the dirt ground

segments.scene_description: Having passed the street light, the walk continues through desert scrubland featuring Joshua trees and scattered rocks. The rocky hillside remains prominent on the left while the futuristic city skyline gradually grows larger and more detailed ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert terrain approaching urban area

agents.ego_description: walking through rockier terrain as individual city buildings become distinguishable in the distance

segments.scene_description: The terrain becomes rockier with scattered stones replacing the softer scrub vegetation. The last Joshua trees pass by as the camera approaches closer to the urban outskirts, with the rocky hillside now dominating the left foreground and the city skyline resolving into distinct architectural forms.

events.description: broken bench debris becomes visible on the left roadside, indicating urban decay

agents.ego_description: approaching the city outskirts where broken debris and detailed commercial building facades with billboards become clearly visible

entered.detail: damaged and overturned bench or furniture lying on the dirt ground
colorful building with large digital billboards and neon signage on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: In the final approach to the city, the scene shifts to urban outskirts with a broken bench appearing on the roadside. The commercial building facades with bright billboards are now clearly visible on the right, while the rocky hillside remains on the left. The camera continues walking forward as the city structures loom large ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a desolate desert highway toward the towering architectural sprawl of a futuristic city. It begins by walking past a street light pole along a multi-lane road, with a rocky hill formation to the left and the distant skyline shimmering under clear blue skies. As the camera advances, the road gives way to arid scrubland dotted with Joshua trees and scattered rocks, while the city skyline gradually grows larger and more detailed. The terrain then shifts to a rockier landscape where the hillside dominates the foreground and the distant buildings resolve into distinct architectural forms. Finally, the scene opens into the urban outskirts, passing a broken roadside bench as bright commercial billboards and massive city structures loom large ahead.
